analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights an online meeting with the ROK ambassador and praises China–ROK mutual support since the COVID-19 outbreak as an excellent example of international cooperation against COVID-19. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention or criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; the tweet frames China as cooperative and supportive in international efforts against COVID-19, exemplifying mutual assistance and cooperation. CH3 (epic history) – Not relevant; no historical framing. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) – Not addressed; focus is international cooperation, not domestic system/values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not explicit; no claims about domestic governance success or leadership superiority. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
